SEARCH
Module pgl.app
Package pgl.app.algo

Class GeometryUtils

java.lang.Object
pgl.app.algo.GeometryUtils
public class GeometryUtils extends Object
Utility class providing geometric algorithms for triangles and points.
Version:
2.0

    • GeometryUtils

      public GeometryUtils()

  • Method Details

    • calculateCircumcenter

      public static Point calculateCircumcenter(Point a, Point b, Point c)
      Calculates the circumcenter of a triangle defined by three points.
      Parameters:
      a - The first vertex.
      b - The second vertex.
      c - The third vertex.
      Returns:
      A new Point representing the circumcenter.

    • isPointInCircumcircle

      public static boolean isPointInCircumcircle(Point p, Triangle t)
      Checks if a point lies inside the circumcircle of a given triangle.

      This method uses an adaptive matrix determinant approach that dynamically accounts for the vertex orientation (Clockwise vs. Counter-Clockwise) of the triangle. It uses an epsilon threshold to handle floating-point precision errors safely.

      Parameters:
      p - the Point to test
      t - the Triangle whose circumcircle is being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if the point lies strictly inside the circumcircle, false otherwise

    • sortByPolarAngle

      public static void sortByPolarAngle(Point center, List<Point> points)
      Sorts a list of points counter-clockwise (polaire) around a center point. * @param center The reference pole.
      Parameters:
      points - The list of points to sort in-place.
